text:
Decision for DIB Reentitlement 
K - Invalid Code Entered 
L - 1972 Blind Provision 
N - BLIND, 1967 Definition 
P - BLIND Prior to Age 31, 1967 Definition 
R - Insured Under Special Insured Status Provision for Young Disabled 
S - BLIND - Original Definition 
T - BLIND, Prior to Age 31, Original Definition 
U - Short-Term Disability 
X - No Waiting Period 
^ - Delete the First Disabled Adult Child (DAC) Field Only
Null/missing – no record of SSA disability determination
D_DISABILITY_PRIMARY_CD
